description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a prominent rail system along the top and bottom, allowing for the attachment of accessories such as optics and grips. A vertical foregrip is mounted beneath the barrel, enhancing stability during firing. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle. The rifle also features flip-up iron sights and a detachable box magazine, with red accent details visible on the receiver and stock. The overall design suggests a compact, urban-oriented firearm suitable for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, vertical foregrip, rail system, and red accent details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel opening, flash hider, and the vertical foregrip directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the collapsible stock, pistol grip, rail system, and the vertical foregrip; red accents are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttstock, pistol grip, and the rear sight; the rail system and red sling attachment are visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine well, and the vertical foregrip; red details are present.
